# MIU Traffic Diagnostic Report — April 29, 2026

**Generated by Joi (Hermes Agent)** | Data Sources: Amplitude, Google Search Console, Night Watch Analytics Logs

---

## TL;DR

**Traffic drop confirmed across two independent sources (Amplitude + GSC).** Organic clicks dropped **-78% from peak** (134 → 29/day). The decline began ~Apr 14-16 — BEFORE the Stripe migration (Apr 24), but the migration **significantly worsened** the situation by tanking session duration by 47%. Google is interpreting short sessions as a negative quality signal.

**Problem #1:** Traffic decline (GSC: -78% clicks from peak). **Problem #2:** Catastrophic CTR in the US (0.3%). **Problem #3:** Keyword cannibalization across multiple blog posts.

---

## 2. GSC Period Comparison

| Metric       | Previous (Mar 2-29) | Current (Mar 30-Apr 26) | Delta                 |
| ------------ | ------------------- | ----------------------- | --------------------- |
| Clicks       | 1,382               | 2,231                   | **+61%**              |
| Impressions  | 38,054              | 89,564                  | **+135%**             |
| CTR          | 3.63%               | 2.49%                   | −31%                  |
| Avg Position | 24.3                | 9.8                     | **+14.5 positions** ⬆ |

**Note:** The 28-day comparison masks the recent decline because it includes the strong Mar 30-Apr 13 growth period. Position improved dramatically (24 → 10), but CTR dropped as impressions grew faster than clicks.

## 3. Session Duration — CRASHED 47% Starting Apr 24

| Period               | Avg Session | vs Baseline          |
| -------------------- | ----------- | -------------------- |
| Apr 21–23 (baseline) | **~257s**   | —                    |
| Apr 24               | 146s        | **−43%**             |
| Apr 25               | 97s         | **−62%** ← worst day |
| Apr 26               | 113s        | −56%                 |
| Apr 27               | 172s        | −33%                 |
| Apr 28               | 156s        | −39%                 |

**Apr 24 = ColdstartLabs Stripe account migration.** Correlation is exact. The deploy (`fix(smoke): update Starter price ID to corp Stripe account post-migration`) introduced checkout bugs that are aborting sessions prematurely.

## 5. CTR Crisis

### 5a. Top Queries Are 77% Branded

| Query               | Clicks | CTR   |
| ------------------- | ------ | ----- |
| my image upscaler   | 833    | 56.6% |
| myimageupscaler     | 821    | 52.5% |
| myimageupscaler.com | 70     | 74.5% |

**1,724 of 2,231 total clicks (77%) are branded navigational queries.** Only 507 clicks come from non-branded search. Site is heavily dependent on people searching for the brand name directly.

### 5b. Blog Posts With Near-Zero CTR

| Page                                                   | Impressions | Clicks | CTR   |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | ----------- | ------ | ----- |
| /blog/best-free-ai-image-upscaler-2026-tested-compared | **29,813**  | 8      | 0.03% |
| /blog/best-ai-image-quality-enhancer-free              | 6,721       | 8      | 0.12% |
| /tools/ai-image-upscaler                               | 1,348       | 10     | 0.74% |

**29,813 impressions → 8 clicks.** The titles and meta descriptions are not converting in SERPs. This is a massive traffic leak. These pages rank at position 8-12 but get virtually zero clicks.

### 5c. USA — Largest Market, Worst CTR

| Country        | Impression Share | CTR       |
| -------------- | ---------------- | --------- |
| USA 🇺🇸         | **53.6%**        | **0.29%** |
| Philippines 🇵🇭 | 1.2%             | 32.8%     |
| India 🇮🇳       | 3.7%             | 8.0%      |
| Brazil 🇧🇷      | 5.6%             | 1.3%      |

The US market accounts for over half of all impressions but has a CTR of 0.29% — **113x worse than the Philippines.** Mobile users have 13x higher CTR than desktop (18.8% vs 1.4%) but receive only 6% of impressions.

---

## 6. Keyword Cannibalization

**Query: "best free ai image upscaler 2026"** → 5 blog posts competing against each other, **all with 0 clicks:**

| Competing Page                                         |
| ------------------------------------------------------ |
| /blog/best-free-ai-image-upscaler-2026-tested-compared |
| /blog/best-free-ai-image-upscaler-tools-2026           |
| /blog/best-ai-image-quality-enhancer-free              |
| /blog/best-image-upscaler                              |
| /blog/best-image-upscaling-tools-2026                  |

This dilutes topical authority — Google doesn't know which page to rank, so none rank well. Each post also cannibalizes on "best free image upscaler 2026", "best free ai image upscaler tools 2026", and "best free ai image upscaler online 2026".

---

## 7. Indexing Issues

| Issue                 | Pages Affected                                                 |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Missing from sitemaps | **6 pages**, including the **homepage** (`/`) and 4 blog posts |
| Canonical mismatch    | /blog/best-free-ai-image-upscaler-tools-2026                   |
| Indexed + PASS        | 10/10 inspected pages (10 randomly selected)                   |

---

## 8. Final Diagnosis

### Timeline of the Decline

```
Apr 8-10: Traffic peak (134 clicks/day GSC, avg position 9)
    ↓
Apr 14: Active users peak (401) — but traffic didn't convert
    ↓
Apr 16: GSC clicks drop 45% (134→74). Organic decline begins.
    ↓
Apr 17-19: Active users fall to 194. Organic traffic already in decline.
    ↓
Apr 24: Stripe migration. Session duration collapses 47%.
        GSC clicks hit 29 (−78% from peak).
    ↓
Apr 25-28: Fragile partial recovery (~55 clicks, ~156s sessions)
```

### Root Causes (Multiple Factors)

1. 🔴 **Technical regression (Stripe migration, Apr 24):** Session duration −47%. Google detects reduced engagement and reduces impressions. **Fix IMMEDIATELY.**

2. 🟡 **Catastrophic non-branded CTR:** Blog posts with 30K impressions and 8 clicks. Titles don't convert in SERPs. Worst in the US market (0.3% CTR).

3. 🟡 **Keyword cannibalization:** 5 posts fighting for the same "best upscaler" queries — all with 0 clicks. Consolidate into a single pillar page.

4. 🟢 **Sitemap gaps:** Homepage + 4 blog posts missing from sitemaps. Fragile indexing situation.

5. 🟢 **77% branded traffic dependency:** Over-reliance on brand-name searches. Vulnerable to any algorithm change affecting navigational queries.

### What It Is NOT:

- ❌ Google Core Update (none reported for April 2026)
- ❌ Manual penalty (DR is rising: 28→30)
- ❌ Competitor stealing traffic (decline too abrupt to be competitive)

---

## 9. Recommended Actions

### 🔴 Immediate (Today)

1. **Fix Stripe migration bugs** — smoke test the full checkout flow end-to-end
2. **Run `yarn verify` + E2E tests** — ensure nothing is broken
3. **Check Baselime logs** for Apr 24-28 for 4xx/5xx error spikes

### 🟡 This Week

4. **Consolidate cannibalized posts** — merge 5 "best upscaler" posts into 1 pillar page with clear internal linking
5. **Rewrite titles/meta descriptions** for posts with CTR <1% — priority: `/blog/best-free-ai-image-upscaler-2026-tested-compared` (30K impressions, 8 clicks)
6. **Fix sitemaps** — add missing pages (homepage + 4 blog posts) to appropriate sitemaps
7. **Audit deploys from Apr 16-24** — the decline started before Stripe; another deploy may have contributed
   ```bash
   git log --oneline --since="2026-04-14" --until="2026-04-25"
   ```

### 🟢 Next Sprint

8. **Optimize for mobile SERP visibility** — mobile CTR is 13x higher than desktop; increase mobile impression share
9. **Non-branded keyword strategy** — reduce dependency on branded traffic (77% is a single point of failure)
10. **Fix Amplitude retention chart** — misconfigured (100% D1 shows as false positive)
